title: BUG #18468: CREATE TABLE ... LIKE leaves orphaned column reference in extended statistics
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0 (a INTEGER, c TEXT, b TEXT, d BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t1 AS SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE FALSE;
INSERT INTO t0 (a, b) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
ALTER TABLE t0 DROP COLUMN c;
CREATE INDEX t_idx ON t0((a || b));
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE ... LIKE with dropped column causes invalid statistics
